name: @lace/agent
description: Out-of-process Lace agent runtime (Ent protocol over stdio)

scripts.prebuild: cd ../.. && npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/ent-protocol
scripts.pretest: cd ../.. && npm run build --workspace=packages/core && npm run build --workspace=packages/ent-protocol && npm run build --workspace=packages/agent
